reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
प्रिय महोदया,

मैं आपको अत्यंत निराशा  के साथ सूचित कर रहा हूं कि प्रेप ए की क्लास टीचर सुश्री नेहा काफी गैर-पेशेवर और निर्दयी इंसान हैं। 

सुश्री नेहा बच्चों के साथ दुर्व्यवहार करती हैं, वह कभी भी आवश्यकता पड़ने पर पानी की बोतल भरने में भी बच्चों का समर्थन नहीं करती हैं और हमेशा बच्चों को शौचालय जाने के लिए हतोत्साहित करती हैं।

गैर-जिम्मेदाराना, आकस्मिक रवैया, टाल-मटोल वाला रवैया प्री प्राइमरी शिक्षक के रूप में स्वीकार्य नहीं हैl

सुश्री नेहा का रवैया निंदनीय है और स्कूल प्रबंधन से एक दृढ़ और सकारात्मक पहल की उम्मीद है।

हार्दिक सम्मान के साथ

प्रेप ए के माता-पिता
SKS WORLD SCHOOL , 
Sector – 137,

reviews.author: Gita Kumari
reviews.review_body: The teachers are good and teaches the students very  well

reviews.author: sriniwas Singh
reviews.review_body: Worst school negative star. Teachers speak in Hindi .aaya take care of kids . principle ke alag tasaon hai unko parents se milna nahi hai .please don't take admission in this school it's a disaster in the name of school. Bhaiya anpadh rakh Lena bachhe ko par is school me mat padhana . Worst into infinity

reviews.author: Sheel Pant
reviews.review_body:
Few good teachers have already left the school, and the relievers are not so competent.

Teachers are speaking Hindi with the students; hence, students are reluctant to communicate or converse in English. Except for Minakshee Ma’am, the staff in reception are very poor in communication and the ability of conveyancing is very poor.

Teacher of nursery class, Mrs. Sangeeta, fails to deal with young kids. It has been observed that she became irritated and also remained busy on her mobile phone, leaving young people under the supervision of Didi. Didi in the class speaks very harsh language with the kids. They never insist young kids finish their meals.

Getting a reply to an email from the school authority is a thousand-dollar question,  maybe the school authority is not qualified enough to write an email.

The principal of the school is most unimpressive. Her administrative ability is below expectations.

The SKS School authority is good, but they are ignoring Sector 137 school. My suggestion to all, kindly please verify all aspects before getting admission to your kids.

Jai Hind

reviews.author: Nupur Grover
reviews.review_body:
School n teachers are partial to students
Only favourite students get chance in all activities.. when you raise issue for the same they will give you silly excuses. It doesn't matter how your ward is talented.. only one two students get chance. Even in annual functions every year one two students will be on the front

reviews.author: arti Verma
reviews.review_body: I put my son in this school recently after reading the reviews I thought it is a good school..but it's my worste experience I never think that not only for 1 point so many things are not good first is teachers are speaking Hindi with the students but at the time of admission they said communication would be in English so no learning of another language.second is few kids are speaking proper villager language in the class that is worste thing and third is the caretaker in the class speaks very harsh and proper villager language with the kids it's my personal experience.i cant say anything about others.one more thing the teacher who used to come in the bus with the kids never greet the kids.

reviews.author: Decotex Exports
reviews.review_body: Please don't send your kids to this school. Low grade teachers are providing low grade education. This is only meant for lower class people and their kids. Before sending any of your kids here, please observe the student gentry here.

reviews.author: Sudeep Nair
reviews.review_body: Highly untrained teachers. They have no clue in child management and even basic knowledge as speaking proper english. SKS has hired low grade teachers at low salaries. The infrastructure is okay but the quality of teachers is really bad. I would not recommend this school to anyone who wants a good education for their child. Very poor teaching standards.if you read the earlier reviews carefully it seems they have used ChatGPT to doctor reviews, going by the language.

reviews.author: SENSING BIRD
reviews.review_body: Very Bad school, no one pick the phone , receptionist don't know their duty.

reviews.author: neha
reviews.review_body: I enrolled my kid in nursery and since than I am very much satisfied.I take a moment here to praise Miss baldeep Kaur of prep A , her patience and willingness to help students individually has been invaluable. I appreciate the time she invest in ensuring that everyone in the class is on track and understands the material.
